title: Human-vs-agent play CLI (new file)
description: Add alphazero/play.py: a CLI to play a human vs a trained MCTSPlayer for tictactoe or connectfour (--game), printing the board each move. New file + tests/test_play.py only; do NOT edit other modules.

title: Negamax/alpha-beta baseline opponent (new file)
description: Add alphazero/baselines.py with a NegamaxPlayer (depth-limited alpha-beta + simple heuristic) implementing the Player protocol, game-agnostic, plus tests/test_baselines.py. ONLY new files; do NOT edit arena.py/game.py/etc.

title: Train Connect Four on Modal + verify
description: Train C4 on Modal; verify tactical correctness (take-win/block-loss), high win% vs random, self-improvement vs checkpoint; then push + PR.

title: Modal --game support for Connect Four
description: Add --game to modal_app.py train_remote + entrypoint so Connect Four trains on Modal with heavier defaults; keep tic-tac-toe path; local unchanged.

title: README: Connect Four section
description: Add a Connect Four section to README.md (game, --game flag, eval approach: tactical+random, Modal usage). ONLY edit README.md.
